prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-3IN1CUSKFS-3PC-ONE-SLVR-PARENT Product Type: FLATWARE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Minimalist Camp Kitchen Utensil Set, Army Military Style MRE Chow Set Description: Get ready for your next meal on the go with the ASR Outdoor 3 in 1 Multi Function Outdoor Utensil Set.

This set includes a knife, fork, and a spoon that clip together for convenience. Perfect for any camping, backpacking, or other travel situations.

Not only great for the outdoors, keep a set in your car, at the office, an emergency kit, or even in your pocket so you're ready to dine anytime. Search Terms: camping utensil outdoor accessories gear stove cookware eating open fire cooking camp light portable table campng flatware eatting plates backpacking spoon knife spork survival roasting marshmello set Features: - LIGHTWEIGHT AND COMPACT: This knife, fork, and spoon camp kitchen utensil set clips together for easy storage making it ideal for lightweight camping, and hiking; No extra fluff, only the important camping gear - BONUS CAN OPENER FUNCTION: The knife utensil conveniently includes a can opener tool for added versatility that comes in handy in a pinch; never leave a full can of chow un-eaten with this extra convenience built in - DURABLE WEATHERPROOF CONSTRUCTION: Made from stainless steel, just like you these camp utensils can hold their own in the great outdoors; Will not rust or corrode under normal circumstances - INCLUDES CARRYING POUCH: Comes in a transparent pouch with a snap closure; doesn't add weight just extra convenience for you on your outdoor hiking trek - 2 PACK MRE CHOW SET: Never dine alone; this two pack of camp kitchen utensils makes sure you're always prepared for company even if you're eating an MRE on the side of a mountain === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
